name: raw-snapshot
status: provenance-only — NOT deployed (see normalized-100m.json for the live distribution)
description: Original Substrate->EVM migration snapshot (block 8116528). Preserved for history and reproducibility of the normalize-down. Amounts taken directly from packages/migration-claim/ outputs.

substrate.claim: SP1 Groth16 zk-proof of Substrate key ownership + merkle proof

evm.source: evm-claims.json (no active EVM claims; the OG EVM airdrop claims expired — see excluded.expired)

treasury.note: the only adjustable bucket; normalized down in normalized-100m.json

expired.policy: NOT ALLOCATED. These OG airdrop claims had a 1-year claim window on the Substrate chain that expired; they are not carried into genesis (no decay, no re-add). Already excluded from merkle-tree.json.
expired.note: 3 pubkeys overlap the active merkle set — resolve in the canonical regen; excluding the expired claim is correct regardless.
